title: ArkAI — A multi-market AI trading prototype (options, prediction markets, spot & perps)
author: bestvape
selftext:
Hey everyone,

Wanted to share a quick preview of what I’ve been working on.

This is ArkAI, something I’ve been developing for quite a while.  
  
ArkAI combines prediction markets (like Polymarket), options markets (like Deribit) and spot/perps( like Binance, & Hyperliquid, etc.) into one mcp endpoint.  
  
The goal is simple: to give ai the tools to see across all the different types of markets, your portfolio in each and the ability to execute. That way it can support all the different types of jobs you do in your trading initially as a copilot and then autonomously. 

It’s still early, but it can connect to polymarket, deribit, binance & hyperliquid. It sees your balance, orders & positions, it can search the market to look for opportunities and then execute trades.   
  
Its an mcp server so you can point chatgpt & claude to it and then create agents with it. One limitation is that chatgpt and claude's terms of service don't let you execute trades when using them. 

We’re refining it every day and experimenting with different trading frameworks.

Here’s a short demo video — would love your feedback or ideas on what would make this most useful.

Thanks for taking a look!
